Two waves of Covid set to hit Scotland this year

Scotland will “almost certainly” face a resurgence of Covid this winter, the national clinical director has said. Jason Leitch said the country was “on the downward slope of the Omicron wave” but he could see another two waves of the virus: a possible wave this summer and near-certain wave in the winter.
